title: jacea × nanianii
side_effects: Jacea × nanianii can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing allergic reactions in some individuals, resulting in symptoms like hives, itching, and swelling. Prolonged use or excessive consumption can lead to gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. In rare cases, it may interact with certain medications, causing adverse effects like dizziness, headaches, and changes in blood pressure. If not used correctly, jacea × nanianii may also exacerbate underlying health conditions, such as kidney or liver disease.
